UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and settings in the AnkDrishti platform.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture or avatar.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

emailVerified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

subscription.description: The subscription tier of the user.

role.description: The role of the user inside the system.

/users/{uid}.description: Stores user profiles keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.
